headline: SLB Launches Digital Marketplace to Scale AI and Digital Innovation Across Energy
summary: HOUSTON, June 15, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced the launch of the SLB Digital Marketplace, a curated digital destination designed to help energy companies rapidly discover and deploy specialized AI agents, domain models, skills, tools, data connectors and digital applications within their existing digital environments.
